notes:
v1.2.2 — Bug Fixes
🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Hidden Tile Interaction: Hidden tiles no longer respond to player clicks or hover highlights.
• Tile Reveal Broadcast: Tile reveal state is now broadcast to all players even when no Opened Image is configured. Previously, other players could re-trigger puzzles on already-opened tiles.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.2.2
announcement.content:
v1.2.2 — Bug Fixes

  • 🐛 Hidden Tile Interaction: Hidden tiles no longer respond to player clicks or hover highlights.
  • 🐛 Tile Reveal Broadcast: Tile reveal state is now properly broadcast to all connected players, regardless of Opened Image settings. Other players can no longer re-trigger puzzles on already-opened tiles.
